title: Consistent Hearts
description: Changes all the heart textures to be consistent with the normal hearts!
body:
Changes all the heart textures to be consistent with the OG red heart, making them look smooth and clean.

 
![The hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a85337a3c0cd28b9e83fd34e0ecbbe22a24d27c.png)
